reviews.review_description:
This is clearly just the beginning of this apps journey, but what’s there is great. Solid framework for what has the potential to a really fun experience, I’m legit interested to see where this goes and what it develops into. 
Can’t wait for my son to see this! 

To the devs..
Prioritize fixing the movement controls to something that were used to, the slow speed and clumsy turning are the only reason I turned the game off without looking at “everything” everything.
